briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

memberdef.argsstring: (Equation_base &equation, const DoubleTab &inconnue, DoubleTab &result, double dt, int numero_iteration, int &ok) override
memberdef.name: iterer_eqn

memberdef.argsstring: (TRUST_List< TRUST_Ref< Equation_base * > > eqs, int compteur, int &ok) override
memberdef.name: iterer_eqs

memberdef.argsstring: (Equation_base &, DoubleTab &current, DoubleTab &pression, double, Matrice_Morse &, double, DoubleTrav &, int nb_iter, int &converge, int &ok) override
memberdef.name: iterer_NS

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTrav &correction_en_pression, DoubleTrav &gradP, DoubleTrav &correction_en_vitesse, const Matrice_Morse &matrice, const Operateur_Grad &gradient)
memberdef.name: calculer_correction_en_vitesse

briefdescription.para: Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.
